rulings.Case Title: DAVID ABRAMOVITZ ET AL VS. FARHAT BAJJALIYA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-18-564432 WITH CASE CGC-16-550493
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday November 5, 2018 line 1. PLAINTIFF DAVID ABRAMOVITZ, BLAIR BRIDGES, MYRIAM FALLON, ADRIENNE KNOLL, LAUREN LEDERMAN, LANCE SHANNON MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-18-564432 WITH CASE CGC-16-550493 GRANTED, subject to Plaintiff obtaining a trial continuance in Department 206. Parties to meet and confer on the new trial date and present a stipulation at the hearing. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: INAM SHAMI VS. SCOTT ENNIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Reopen Discovery And To Compel Further Responses To Written Discovery; And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday November 5, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT AZ DESIGN & ENGINEERING, INC. MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Reopen Discovery And To Compel Further Responses To Written Discovery; And For Sanctions DENIED in part and Hearing Required in part. Motion to Compel Further Responses it DENIED. Motion is untimely. Hearing Required re: Motion to Reopen Discovery and conduct 5 witness deposition. Parties to appear at 8:30 a.m. and engage in meaningful meet and confer effrots regarding the sequence of expert and city witness depositions. = (501/REQ)
